assertions.assertion: Sets AllowOfflineAccess = true to enable refresh tokens
Sets RefreshTokenUsage to TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly for rotation on each use
Sets AbsoluteRefreshTokenLifetime to 604800 (7 days in seconds)
assertions.rationale: AbsoluteRefreshTokenLifetime = 604800 is set with comment '7 days'.

assertions.assertion: Sets SlidingRefreshTokenLifetime to 86400 (1 day in seconds) and RefreshTokenExpiration to TokenExpiration.Sliding
assertions.rationale: SlidingRefreshTokenLifetime = 86400 and RefreshTokenExpiration = TokenExpiration.Sliding are both set.
